summary: Audience recording with decent ambience but a cut‑off encore and mislabeled date
review: The tape captures the audience sound fairly well, giving a pleasant live feel, yet the recording is marred by a sharp cutoff of "Brokedown Palace" in the encore and confusion over the concert date. Reviewers note that the show is actually from 12/27/1979 (or possibly 12/30/79) and criticize the mislabeling and incomplete track.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers are dissatisfied with labeling errors and a missing portion of the encore, resulting in low overall satisfaction despite acceptable audience ambience

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally decent crowd ambience but the encore (Brokedown Palace) is cut off sharply; mislabeling adds confusion

show_quality.setlist_flow: Date discrepancy and missing ending of the encore disrupts the perceived flow of the concert
